name: Zoom Communications, Inc.
summary: Zoom Communications, Inc. (ticker: ZM, CIK: 0001585521) operates a communications and collaboration platform. The company provides products and services focused on video, voice, and messaging communications, with evolving AI capabilities integrated into its platform. Zoom serves customers across various markets, enabling remote and hybrid work collaboration through its software-based platform.

products.name: Zoom Communications and Collaboration Platform
products.description: A communications and collaboration platform with evolving AI capabilities for video, voice, and messaging.
